element.hint: Show a line or marker indicating the mean value
element.label: Show Mean Line
element.name: show_mean

element.hint: Radius of outlier point markers in pixels
element.label: Outlier Point Radius
element.name: outlier_radius

element.hint: Render box plots horizontally instead of vertically
element.label: Horizontal
element.name: horizontal

element.hint: Visual style of the box plot whiskers
element.label: Whiskers style
element.name: whisker_style

element.hint: Display outlier points beyond the whiskers
element.label: Show Outliers
element.name: show_outliers

element.hint: Custom label text displayed beside the Y-axis
element.label: Y-Axis Label
element.name: y_axis_label

element.hint: Proportional width of boxes (0-1, where 0.6 means 60% of available space)
element.label: Box Width
element.name: box_width

element.hint: Opacity of the box fill color (0-1)
element.label: Box Fill Opacity
element.name: box_fill_opacity

element.hint: Custom label text displayed below the X-axis
element.label: X-Axis Label
element.name: x_axis_label
